title: America's Wild Seasons
subTitle: In autumn, change sweeps across America. As the trees greet the chill with a blaze of color, it's make or break time for animals. Time to pull up stakes, make last minute preparations, and often find a mate before the cold sets in.

title: Animal Planet HD Tamil
subTitle: Animal Planet HD Tamil

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: The Taiga, the world's largest forest, occupies the northern regions of North America, Europe and Asia and is inhabited by bears, wolverines, wolves and moose.

title: Big Cat Tales
subTitle: Jonathan discovers the secretive den site of Dada the lioness' newborn cubs. Meanwhile, Olare, the leopard, displays a rarely seen mating ritual.

title: San Diego: America's Wildest City
subTitle: Experiencing the hidden wonders of San Diego, where humans and wildlife coexist in the country's most biodiverse urban landscape.

title: Animal Planet HD Tamil
subTitle: The life story of a charismatic hippo in Zambia's Luangwa Valley. Over 35 years, he grows from a small calf to a full-fledged leader. His experiences make him stronger and stronger, until he is ready for kingship.

title: Great Parks of Africa
subTitle: Table Mountain National Park on the southwestern tip of Africa surrounded by ocean and humanity. It is a rugged peninsula jutting out into the cold Atlantic Ocean and forming an island of incredible diversity.

title: Animal Planet HD Tamil
subTitle: Animal Planet HD Tamil

title: Ocean Wild
subTitle: The crystal clear waters of East Asia are home to some of the world's rarest and most exotic creatures. An exploration of a stunning underwater landscape, and how these aquatic species have evolved alongside their environment.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Wade hunts for the Lau-lau, a creature said to swallow men whole.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many of whom wer rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy Wade retraces the doomed boat's last voyage to discover what was behind the event.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Wade faces one of his greatest fears to uncover increasing missing persons cases.

title: China's Wild Secrets
subTitle: In southwestern China, towering mountains provide shelter for nearly 2,000 wild giant pandas. Giant Panda National Park is three times the size of Yellowstone and is home to over 10,000 species.

title: China's Wild Secrets
subTitle: There aren't many rainforests in China, but Hainan Island, known as China's Hawaii, is an exception. The island's isolation for millions of years has allowed unique species to develop.

title: China's Wild Secrets
subTitle: At the Roof of the World, we find the sources of three great rivers: the Huanghe, the Yangtze, and the Mekong. These rich waterways allow genetically unique species to flourish.

title: Ocean Wild
subTitle: The crystal clear waters of East Asia are home to some of the world's rarest and most exotic creatures. An exploration of a stunning underwater landscape, and how these aquatic species have evolved alongside their environment.

title: Ocean Wild
subTitle: Indonesia is home to one of the most biodiverse environments on Earth, with a coastline stretching across seventeen thousand islands. Discover some of the strangest looking creatures in the ocean.

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: The forests of southern Europe and North Africa, the perfect territory for oak trees and more than 300 animal species, including the critically endangered imperial eagle.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: In the Kruger National Park in South Africa, Dianne finds a boomslang and a chameleon in a duel on the tar road. Not an environment where they would encounter each other under any normal circumstances.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: In the slippery rock-lined Sand River, John Varty struggles to save an enormous two-tonne bull giraffe that's gone down and can't get up.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: In the slippery rock-lined Sand River, John Varty struggles to save an enormous two-tonne bull giraffe that's gone down and can't get up.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: A showcase of some of wildlife's most remarkable moments, caught on film by amateurs and professionals. We reveal the full spectrum of animal behaviour: the brutal, the beautiful and the bizarre. Each moment is explained by experts in the field.

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: Travelling to some of the world's major forests and jungles, providing a complete view of their wildlife, biodiversity and importance for life on the planet.

subTitle: Survivors and experts share tales of Australia's deadly beaches and dangerous waters.

subTitle: Venturing into Australia's wild reveals nature's beauty and challenges.

subTitle: Australia's suburbs conceal threats from wildlife and extreme weather.

subTitle: Meet survivors who have been lost in the wilderness, trapped underground or buried by landslides.

subTitle: A forest that grows on top of volcanic cones and is capable of growing after a fire. Among its branches live animals as unique as the blue finch, canary and Barbary falcon.

subTitle: Wade hunts for the Lau-lau, a creature said to swallow men whole.

title: Elephants Up Close
subTitle: Elephants are the largest mammals to roam the earth. There are still thousands of them in the savannah of Botswana. Their extraordinary sensitivity and their social bonds are the basis of their survival.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Extreme fishing series. Jeremy investigates three mysterious deaths in three South American countries on his most remote mission to date.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Wade comes face-to-face with one of South America's greatest freshwater fighting fish.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Daring biologist and extreme fisherman Jeremy Wade travels to Guyana in South America in search of a terrifying river monster believed to be responsible for the mysterious disappearance of several people.

title: China's Wild Secrets
subTitle: Spanning five of China's hidden wildlife havens, exploring some of the world's most diverse ecosystems. From lush rainforests to soaring mountains, we uncover never-before-seen animal behaviours.

title: San Diego: America's Wildest City

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: South Africa's Drakensberg is one of the continent's most impressive landscapes. It is home to sharp climatic and ecological gradients as physical conditions change for both land-based creatures and the Raptors that swirl in the skies above.

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive, and its great centrepiece holds water through even the driest of times.

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: Simien Mountains National Park in Ethiopia is home to some of the rarest creatures on earth. A glimpse into life on some of the highest peaks in Africa, in the last stronghold of shaggy, grass-grazing Geladas, elusive Simien wolves and horned Walia ibex.

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: The Southern Drylands is a journey into the most arid and extreme environments in the furthest reaches of southern Africa. Spectacular but treacherous places where almost no rain falls with incredibly resilient creatures.

title: Creative Killers
subTitle: Discover how ancient reptiles calculate odds and launch speeds to catch their dinner.

title: Elephants Up Close
subTitle: Elephants are the largest mammals to roam the earth. There are still thousands of them in the savannah of Botswana. Their extraordinary sensitivity and their social bonds are the basis of their survival.

title: Elephants Up Close
subTitle: African elephants have an extraordinary ability to find waterholes and communicate with each other.

title: Africa's Hunters
subTitle: Kamuti is a wise old leopard who has reigned over two square miles of prime territory in the Luangwa Valley for ten years, but now she is in trouble. At 13-years-old, Kamuti is one of the oldest leopards in the African bush, and she is not as effective a hunter as she used to be. Kamuti's problems are compounded by her neighbours, the Nsefu pride of lions, who steal her kills and attack her on sight.

title: A Wolf's Journey
subTitle: Driven out of his pack, a young wolf has to face his fate alone and try to survive in a world ruled by man.

subTitle: The forests of southern Europe and North Africa, the perfect territory for oak trees and more than 300 animal species, including the critically endangered imperial eagle.

title: Just Animals
subTitle: Explores the interesting facets, physical features, behaviours and habitats of a wide variety of animal species.

title: The Zoo
subTitle: Located just 10 miles from New York's Times Square, the Bronx Zoo is a recognised world leader in animal care and species conservation. It houses more than 6,000 animals and has a staff of 500-plus people dedicated to their care and well-being. Never before have camera crews been granted full access to the 265-acre campus, until production of the docuseries `The Zoo'. The results are stories focusing on dozens of animals and experiences at the facility, and its critical mission to conserve wildlife around the world. Episodes also highlight various employees and how their expertise and skills help provide top-quality care for the animals.

title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
subTitle: Carrying on late wildlife conservationist Steve Irwin's mission to bring people closer to animals is now the mission of his family. Terri, Bindi and Robert Irwin return to Animal Planet, giving viewers access to their wildlife adventures around the world and the amazing animals that continue to inspire their conservation efforts. The series features the family caring for more than 1,200 animals at the Australia Zoo; overseeing a world-class wildlife hospital, the largest of its kind in the world; and conducting high-level global expeditions.

title: Jewels of the Natural World
subTitle: Explores stunning natural landscapes and how animals act on their protective and fierce nature to survive and reproduce.

title: Into the Wild: India
subTitle: A journey into India's wilderness highlighting some of its most iconic creatures and diverse habitats. Ranging from tundra to extreme desert, rainforest to urban jungle which provide varied ecological and geographical areas for species to survive.

title: Wild By Nature
subTitle: WILD BY NATURE is a television series about wild nature, which deals with the endemic fauna of Mexico, narrated from a fresh, intrepid, and original point of view with a message of conservation and care for our species. Our protagonist, the actor and naturalist Arturo Islas travels through the going into their jungles, deserts, and seas in search of the wonderful species of fauna: mammals, birds, reptiles, amphibians, fish, and insects. WILD BY NATURE is a great experience of adventure and knowledge of natural wealth.
